headline: TD Cowen Upgrades IQVIA (IQV) to Buy and Raises Price Target to $213
summary: IQVIA Holdings Inc. (NYSE:IQV) is one of the 10 Best Diagnostics and Research Stocks to Buy According to Analysts. On March 9, 2026, TD Cowen upgraded its rating on IQVIA Holdings Inc. (NYSE:IQV) from Hold to Buy. Along with the rating upgrade, the firm also raised its price target on the stock from $174 to […]
